seed.beanstalk_coffee.country_codes.name: country_codes
seed.beanstalk_coffee.country_codes.description: ISO 3166-1 country codes mapped to region and continent for geo rollups.

seed.beanstalk_coffee.product_categories.name: product_categories
seed.beanstalk_coffee.product_categories.description: Category hierarchy lookup keyed by category_key (e.g. coffee/single-origin/ethiopia).

model.beanstalk_coffee.stg_shop__custome.name: stg_shop__customers
model.beanstalk_coffee.stg_shop__custome.description: Cleaned customer records: lowercased emails, parsed names, deduped on customer_id.

customer_id.name: customer_id
customer_id.description: Surrogate primary key for the customer.

country_code.name: country_code
country_code.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code from shipping address.

signup_date.name: signup_date
signup_date.description: Date the customer created their account.

model.beanstalk_coffee.stg_shop__orders.name: stg_shop__orders
model.beanstalk_coffee.stg_shop__orders.description: Storefront orders with status normalized and order totals cast to numeric.

order_id.name: order_id
order_id.description: Surrogate primary key for the order.

ordered_at.name: ordered_at
ordered_at.description: Timestamp the customer placed the order.

status.name: status
status.description: One of: placed, paid, fulfilled, refunded, cancelled.

order_total_usd.name: order_total_usd
order_total_usd.description: Order grand total in USD, incl. tax + shipping.

subtotal_usd.name: subtotal_usd
subtotal_usd.description: Order subtotal in USD, excl. tax + shipping.

model.beanstalk_coffee.stg_shop__order_i.name: stg_shop__order_items
model.beanstalk_coffee.stg_shop__order_i.description: Order line items with line totals recomputed for consistency.

model.beanstalk_coffee.stg_shop__product.name: stg_shop__products
model.beanstalk_coffee.stg_shop__product.description: Active product catalog with category_key normalized for joining to product_categories.

model.beanstalk_coffee.stg_shop__subscri.name: stg_shop__subscriptions
model.beanstalk_coffee.stg_shop__subscri.description: Subscription records with cadence parsed and statuses normalized.

model.beanstalk_coffee.stg_shop__invento.name: stg_shop__inventory_snapshots
model.beanstalk_coffee.stg_shop__invento.description: Daily inventory snapshots, deduped per (snapshot_date, sku).

model.beanstalk_coffee.stg_stripe__charg.name: stg_stripe__charges
model.beanstalk_coffee.stg_stripe__charg.description: Stripe charges with amounts converted from cents to USD numeric.

order_id.name: order_id
order_id.description: Linked back to shop orders via metadata.

model.beanstalk_coffee.stg_segment__web_.name: stg_segment__web_events
model.beanstalk_coffee.stg_segment__web_.description: Segment clickstream events with bot traffic filtered out.

model.beanstalk_coffee.int_orders__line_.name: int_orders__line_items_joined
model.beanstalk_coffee.int_orders__line_.description: Orders joined with their line items and product metadata. One row per order_item, denormalized.

model.beanstalk_coffee.int_subscriptions.name: int_subscriptions__active_periods
model.beanstalk_coffee.int_subscriptions.description: Subscription lifecycles flattened into [started_at, ended_at) active windows for time-bound aggregations.

active_to.name: active_to
active_to.description: Exclusive upper bound; null while active.

model.beanstalk_coffee.int_web_sessions_.name: int_web_sessions__sessionized
model.beanstalk_coffee.int_web_sessions_.description: Web events grouped into sessions (30-minute inactivity gap) with first-touch UTM attribution.

converted.name: converted
converted.description: Whether the session contained a purchase event.

model.beanstalk_coffee.int_customers__or.name: int_customers__order_summary
model.beanstalk_coffee.int_customers__or.description: One row per customer with first/last order date, total orders, and lifetime gross revenue.

model.beanstalk_coffee.dim_customers.name: dim_customers
model.beanstalk_coffee.dim_customers.description: Customer dimension with lifetime aggregates and geographic enrichment from country_codes.

model.beanstalk_coffee.dim_products.name: dim_products
model.beanstalk_coffee.dim_products.description: Product dimension joined to the category hierarchy.

model.beanstalk_coffee.dim_subscriptions.name: dim_subscriptions
model.beanstalk_coffee.dim_subscriptions.description: Subscription dimension with one row per subscription, including its active windows.

model.beanstalk_coffee.fct_orders.name: fct_orders
model.beanstalk_coffee.fct_orders.description: One row per order with customer attribution and revenue split out.

model.beanstalk_coffee.fct_order_items.name: fct_order_items
model.beanstalk_coffee.fct_order_items.description: One row per line item, with product and category attribution for revenue-by-SKU analysis.

model.beanstalk_coffee.fct_payments.name: fct_payments
model.beanstalk_coffee.fct_payments.description: Stripe charges joined to shop orders, with failed and refunded charges retained for reconciliation.

model.beanstalk_coffee.fct_web_sessions.name: fct_web_sessions
model.beanstalk_coffee.fct_web_sessions.description: One row per web session with first-touch attribution and customer linkage where identified.

customer_id.name: customer_id
customer_id.description: Nullable when the session was anonymous.

model.beanstalk_coffee.fct_subscription_.name: fct_subscription_events
model.beanstalk_coffee.fct_subscription_.description: Transitions on the subscription lifecycle (start, pause, churn, reactivate) with elapsed days since prior event.

model.beanstalk_coffee.mart_daily_revenu.name: mart_daily_revenue
model.beanstalk_coffee.mart_daily_revenu.description: Daily gross/net revenue rollup combining order revenue with refunds applied from payments.

model.beanstalk_coffee.mart_customer_lif.name: mart_customer_lifetime_value
model.beanstalk_coffee.mart_customer_lif.description: Customer-level LTV combining one-time order revenue with subscription revenue projections.

model.beanstalk_coffee.mart_product_perf.name: mart_product_performance
model.beanstalk_coffee.mart_product_perf.description: Product-level performance: units sold, revenue, reorder rate, and current inventory days-on-hand.

reorder_rate.name: reorder_rate
reorder_rate.description: Share of customers who purchased this SKU more than once.

model.beanstalk_coffee.mart_acquisition_.name: mart_acquisition_funnel
model.beanstalk_coffee.mart_acquisition_.description: Marketing funnel by acquisition channel: sessions → checkouts → first orders → repeat orders.

source.beanstalk_coffee.shop_db.customer.name: customers
source.beanstalk_coffee.shop_db.customer.description: Customer records from the storefront database (one row per registered customer).

customer_id.name: customer_id
customer_id.description: Surrogate primary key for the customer.

country_code.name: country_code
country_code.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code from shipping address.

signup_date.name: signup_date
signup_date.description: Date the customer created their account.

source.beanstalk_coffee.shop_db.orders.name: orders
source.beanstalk_coffee.shop_db.orders.description: One row per order placed through the storefront, in any status.

order_id.name: order_id
order_id.description: Surrogate primary key for the order.

ordered_at.name: ordered_at
ordered_at.description: Timestamp the customer placed the order.

status.name: status
status.description: One of: placed, paid, fulfilled, refunded, cancelled.

order_total_usd.name: order_total_usd
order_total_usd.description: Order grand total in USD, incl. tax + shipping.

subtotal_usd.name: subtotal_usd
subtotal_usd.description: Order subtotal in USD, excl. tax + shipping.

source.beanstalk_coffee.shop_db.order_it.name: order_items
source.beanstalk_coffee.shop_db.order_it.description: Line items within each order. Multiple rows per order.

source.beanstalk_coffee.shop_db.products.name: products
source.beanstalk_coffee.shop_db.products.description: Product catalog: coffees, espresso blends, brewing accessories, gift cards.

source.beanstalk_coffee.shop_db.subscrip.name: subscriptions
source.beanstalk_coffee.shop_db.subscrip.description: Recurring coffee subscriptions. One row per subscription instance.

source.beanstalk_coffee.shop_db.inventor.name: inventory_snapshots
source.beanstalk_coffee.shop_db.inventor.description: Daily inventory counts per SKU pulled from the warehouse system.

source.beanstalk_coffee.stripe.charges.name: charges
source.beanstalk_coffee.stripe.charges.description: All Stripe charges, successful and failed, replicated via Fivetran.

order_id.name: order_id
order_id.description: Linked back to shop orders via metadata.

source.beanstalk_coffee.segment.web_even.name: web_events
source.beanstalk_coffee.segment.web_even.description: Clickstream events from the marketing site and storefront, via Segment.

exposure.beanstalk_coffee.executive_kpi_.name: executive_kpi_dashboard
exposure.beanstalk_coffee.executive_kpi_.description: Weekly executive review: revenue, LTV, and acquisition headline metrics.

exposure.beanstalk_coffee.marketing_attr.name: marketing_attribution_sheet
exposure.beanstalk_coffee.marketing_attr.description: Channel attribution Google Sheet refreshed weekly by the marketing team.

exposure.beanstalk_coffee.ops_inventory_.name: ops_inventory_tracker
exposure.beanstalk_coffee.ops_inventory_.description: Operations app for the warehouse team to flag SKUs trending below reorder threshold.
